cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Steven could have gone to the gas station. Let me start by going through all the given information step by step. First, Steven woke up at 7am. Then, Ashley saw him stretching at a yoga studio from 7am to 10am. So from 7 to 10, he was at yoga. Then William saw him at the library reading from 1pm to 2pm. After that, Jennifer saw him working at the office from 2pm to 3pm. Michael saw him at the theater watching a movie from 3pm to 7pm. Then Mary saw him at the train station from 7pm to 10pm. The gas station is closed after 10pm, so he has to go before that. But the gas station is closed after 10pm, so he can't go there. So the only possible time he was free is 10am to 1pm. Let me check the options again. Option C is 10am to 1pm.
